speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.summary: Powell maintained the federal funds rate at 3.5-3.75% and signaled policy flexibility, stating the Fed is 'well positioned' to adjust rates based on incoming data with no preset course.

speeches.name: Lorie Logan
speeches.summary: Logan issued a statement on FOMC dissent following the April 28-29 meeting, indicating disagreement with the committee's decision.

speeches.name: Federal Reserve Official
speeches.summary: Testimony on artificial intelligence in the financial system was delivered before Congress.

speeches.name: Federal Reserve Official
speeches.summary: Speech on modernizing Federal Reserve operations in the 21st century was delivered.

macro_fred.narrative: Leaning Neutral: CPI at 3.3%, Fed Funds at 3.64%, unemployment at 4.3%.
